metric_value: IBM agreed in 1987 to buy and resell Stratus products — first time IBM had turned to another vendor for hardware/software OLTP products
notes: Kastner characterization; corresponds to IBM System/88 line

metric_value: OLTP is the fastest growing segment of the computer industry

Stratus has the upper hand in the OLTP market; the company does not intend to complacently watch Sequoia

notes: Kastner observation; proved correct for Sequoia (acquired by Texas Micro 1996)
